payload.author: claude
payload.body: PR #1 MERGED to main (merge commit preserves the 30 per-ticket commits; CI green; both Codex review findings fixed + replied). Remaining for v0.1 release: RT-58 publish — now with two discovered blockers recorded on that ticket: crate names 'trust' and 'cargo-trust' are TAKEN on crates.io (cargo-trust is an existing 1.0.0 security-audit cargo subcommand — the 'cargo trust' command itself collides), and no cargo token on this machine. 8 of 10 names are free.
